CustomField.formula:
IF( (budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) > 0, "💰💰💰" & BR() & "📈 𝐄𝐗𝐂𝐄́𝐃𝐄𝐍𝐓 : ➕ " & IF(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) >= 1000000, TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) / 1000000)) & " ", "") & IF(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) >= 1000, RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) / 1000)), 3) & " ", "") & RIGHT(TEXT(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c)), 3) & " 𝐗𝐎𝐅",
IF( (budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) = 0, "⚖️⚖️⚖️" & BR() & "🎯 𝐄́𝐐𝐔𝐈𝐋𝐈𝐁𝐑𝐄 : 𝟎 𝐗𝐎𝐅",
"🚨🚨🚨" & BR() & "📉 𝐃𝐄́𝐅𝐈𝐂𝐈𝐓 : ➖ " & IF(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) >= 1000000, TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) / 1000000)) & " ", "") & IF(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) >= 1000, RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c) / 1000)), 3) & " ", "") & RIGHT(TEXT(ABS(budget_c__c - actual_cost__c)), 3) & " 𝐗𝐎𝐅" ) )
CustomField.label: ecart budgétaire
